sessions.summary: Tried 4 source forms (do-while, while, for, val-split). cc1 stubbornly puts addu $16,$16,1 before lw in loop body. No lever found. Source reverted to HEAD; oracle green.

BLOCKED on sandbox tooling: `sandbox func_80045294 --disable all` fails to build text1a_c.c at HEAD. Sandbox cheat-asm stripping removes `register T x asm($N)` pins from text1a_c.c lines 94,100,222,297,607-610,628 etc., exposing latent conflicting extern decls that were tolerated by the full build (`extern s32 D_80095328;` at L521 vs `extern s16 D_80095328;` at L1078; same for D_800A9D04 at L1137/1173/1383; func_80042874 at L425/1080 with different signatures; func_800455AC L1733/1860; too-few-args call to func_8004574C at L1823). cc1 emits malformed asm (`{standard input}:3293: Error: operand 2 must be an immediate expression `lh $sp,$sp,88'`) which `as` rejects. Cannot reproduce the prior session's documented candidate_floor=2 measurement and cannot measure any new candidate against the gradient. Per prompt's no_progress contract ('tested at least 3 NEW structural variants' requires measurement), the four listed next_hypotheses (extra lw consumer, pointer iteration `ptr += 0x10`, BB2_SCHED_DEBUG instrumented cc1, sibling RTL diff) are NOT executable in this session without first repairing either (a) the latent extern decl conflicts in text1a_c.c at file scope or (b) the sandbox tooling to tolerate them as the full build does. Source untouched; oracle green (verify-oracle build_matches:true, sha1=62efab4f...). Referenced research files `tmp/sotn_research_func_80045294*.md` cited in this session's prompt do not exist on disk.

rejected_forms: do { sum += load; i+=1; v1+=0x10; } while(i<count);  [HEAD]
do { s32 val = load; i+=1; sum+=val; v1+=0x10; } while(i<count);
for (; i < count; i++, v1+=0x10) { sum += load; }
remaining_gap: 1 nop in first loop load-delay slot (8 bytes -> distance 2). Cheat: 2 deletes + 1 insert relocating addu $16,$16,1 from loop-top to between lw and addu sum.
next_hypotheses: BLOCKER: repair text1a_c.c extern decl conflicts (D_80095328 s32/s16; D_800A9D04 s32/s8*/s32; func_80042874 (void)/(s32*,s32*); func_800455AC; func_8004574C arity) so sandbox builds the stripped form. Once sandbox is measurable again, the prior four hypotheses are unblocked.
BB2_SCHED_DEBUG instrumented cc1 to read actual INSN_PRIORITY for lw vs addiu in loop
Pointer-based loop iteration (ptr += 0x10) — may shift RTL insn shape
Match-sibling RTL diff (func_80044100's *ptr += val; i++; ptr++ loop)
